summary: Tested Creator Tiers & Revenue Routing features: Gear Hub catalog (9 items seeded), Shaka feedback system (6 animations), and photographer go-live/end-session with earnings_destination fields. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - Gear Hub page loads correctly with gear items, credits balance, category filters. Sidebar correctly shows Gear Hub link ONLY for Hobbyist users.

issues: Gear item images are placeholders (null image_url) - showing category icons instead. Real product images would improve UX.

critical_code_review_comments: Gear Hub endpoints correctly implemented with category filtering and featured_only
User progress endpoint correctly calculates progress_percentage and credits_needed
Shaka animations are hardcoded (6 animations) - working as expected
End-session correctly creates Gallery and calls process_creator_earnings with session destination
Revenue routing in revenue_routing.py correctly differentiates PRO (20% fee, withdrawable) vs HOBBYIST (5-10% fee, gear only)
Sidebar.js correctly shows Gear Hub link only for Hobbyist and Grom Parent roles
GearHub.js correctly displays credits balance, progress bars, Set as Goal and Redeem Credits buttons
seed_data_creation: Gear catalog seeded with 9 items (cameras, lenses, drones, surfboards, wetsuits, accessories). Shaka animations are hardcoded (6 animations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creator Tiers & Revenue Routing fully implemented. Key verified flows: 1) GET /api/gear-hub with category/featured_only filters 2) GET /api/gear-hub/user/{id}/progress shows available_credits and progress_items 3) POST /api/gear-hub/{id}/purchase validates credits and deducts 4) GET /api/shaka/animations returns 6 hardcoded animations 5) GET /api/shaka/pending/{id} returns sponsorships needing shaka response 6) POST /api/photographer/{id}/go-live accepts earnings_destination fields 7) POST /api/photographer/{id}/end-session routes earnings via process_creator_earnings(). Frontend correctly shows Gear Hub link only for Hobbyist/Grom Parent roles.

backend: GET /api/gear-hub - Returns catalog of gear items (PASSED)
GET /api/gear-hub/user/{user_id}/progress - User gear credits and progress (PASSED)
frontend: Sidebar shows Gear Hub link for Hobbyist users (PASSED)
Sidebar hides Gear Hub link for Photographer users (PASSED)
Gear Hub page loads with gear items (PASSED)
Category filter buttons visible and functional (PASSED)
Set as Goal and Redeem Credits buttons visible (PASSED)

mocked_api_note: Affiliate URLs in gear catalog point to real B&H/Adorama product pages but are NOT tracked - user hasn't provided affiliate keys yet. The affiliate_commission_rate field is set but not used for actual tracking.
